supporting_quote: Prior to quantitative PCR analysis, primer-probe sets specific to the target gene being measured are evaluated for their ability to be "multiplexed" with a GAPDH amplification reaction. In multiplexing, both the target gene and the internal standard gene GAPDH are amplified concurrently in a single sample. ... Data was normalized to GAPDH levels in untreated controls.
notes: Early Isis/Ionis patent (Talin/TLN1). Real-time quantitative PCR on ABI PRISM 7700. The primary high-throughput screen uses GAPDH (human GAPDH primer-probe: fwd GAAGGTGAAGGTCGGAGTC / rev GAAGATGGTGATGGGATTTC, JOE-CAAGCTTCCCGTTCTCAGCC-TAMRA) as the multiplexed internal standard; Northern blot validation also normalized to GAPDH. NO RIBOGREEN anywhere (predates Ionis RiboGreen era). 'total RNA' hits are only the Northern-blot RNA-prep step (20 ug total RNA on agarose gel), not a normalization basis. 'actin' hits are decoys (actinomycin D, actin filaments in Talin biology). used_actb=no.

supporting_quote: Cultured A431 cells ... MALAT1 RNA levels were measured as previously described using the Human MALAT1 primer-probe set RTS2736. MALAT1 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below as percent control of the amount of MALAT1 RNA relative to untreated control cells (% UTC).
notes: Modern Ionis patent. All assigned A431 in-vitro tables (% UTC; primer-probe RTS2736/RTS2738) normalize to total RNA via RIBOGREEN (13 total-RNA blocks, all mapping to A-431/A431 or HepG2). EXCEPTION is NOT in A431: 4 'MALAT1 RNA levels were normalized to b-actin, measured using human primer-probe set HTS5002' blocks all occur in MDA-MB-436 cells (a different cell line), so b-actin/ACTB does not apply to the assigned A431 rows -> used_actb=no for this cell line (real ACTB normalizer exists in the patent but only for MDA-MB-436). assay_method RT-qPCR.

supporting_quote: In multiplexing, both the target gene and the internal standard gene GAPDH are amplified concurrently in a single sample. ... For human GAPDH the PCR primers were: forward primer GAAGGTGAAGGTCGGAGTC (SEQ ID NO: 7) reverse primer GAAGATGGTGATGGGATTTC (SEQ ID NO: 8) ... Data was normalized to GAPDH levels in untreated controls.
notes: Early Isis/Ionis patent (PTP1B/PTPN1). Real-time quantitative PCR; primary in-vitro screen normalized to multiplexed internal-standard GAPDH; Northern blot validation also normalized to GAPDH. NO RIBOGREEN (predates RiboGreen era). 'total RNA' hits are Northern-blot RNA prep only. In-vivo mouse studies normalize RNA 'expressed as a percentage of saline treated control' (not a different normalizer gene for the cell rows). 'actin' = decoys (actinomycin/integrin biology). used_actb=no.

supporting_quote: Quantitation of Survivin mRNA levels was determined by real-time quantitative PCR using the ABI PRISM 7700 Sequence Detection System ... For human GAPDH the PCR primers were: forward primer: GAAGGTGAAGGTCGGAGTC (SEQ ID NO: 7) reverse primer: GAAGATGGTGATGGGATTTC (SEQ ID NO: 8) ... membranes were stripped and probed for human glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (GAPDH) RNA ... Data was normalized to GAPDH levels in untreated controls.
notes: Early Isis/Ionis patent (Survivin/BIRC5). Same standard Isis methodology: real-time quantitative PCR with multiplexed internal-standard GAPDH (human GAPDH primer-probe SEQ ID 7/8/9) for the primary screen; Northern blot normalized to GAPDH. NO RIBOGREEN (predates RiboGreen era). 'total RNA' = Northern-blot RNA-prep step only. 'actin' = decoys (actinomycin D in chemo-agent lists). used_actb=no.

supporting_quote: Cultured HepG2 cells ... RNA was isolated from the cells and C9ORF72 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human C9ORF72 primer probe set RTS3750 was used to measure total C9ORF72 mRNA levels. ... C9ORF72 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of C9ORF72.
notes: Modern Ionis patent. All 12 HepG2 result-normalization blocks (primer-probe RTS3750 exon-2 total transcript / RTS3905 pathogenic repeat variant) 'adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN'. Cyclophilin A appears ONLY in generic methods boilerplate ('normalized using either ... cyclophilin A, or by quantifying total RNA using RIBOGREEN') -> decoy, not the actual basis for the C9orf72 data. used_actb=no.
